Best India to Kazakhstan Tour Packages – Discover Central Asia’s Hidden Gem

Welcome to the best India to Kazakhstan tour packages, where Central Asia’s hidden gem awaits your discovery. Kazakhstan offers an extraordinary blend of snow-capped mountains, endless steppes, futuristic cities, and rich cultural heritage. With Travelxploria, your trusted best international travel agents in Kolkata and best tour and travel company in India, explore the wonders of Kazakhstan through carefully curated Kazakhstan tour packages designed for comfort, culture, and unforgettable experiences.
(Note: Travelxploria is recognized by the Kazakhstan Tourism Board for excellence in international travel services and known among the best domestic tour operators in India.)

Why Choose Kazakhstan for Your Next International Trip?

Diverse Landscapes from Steppes to Mountains
Kazakhstan’s vast landscapes range from the golden steppes stretching endlessly to majestic, snow-covered peaks. Whether it’s the turquoise waters of Big Almaty Lake or the dramatic formations of Charyn Canyon, every destination promises stunning views and adventures for all types of travelers.
(Pro tip: The best time to visit these natural wonders is during spring or autumn for comfortable weather and vibrant scenery.)

Rich History and Vibrant Culture
Step back in time along the ancient Silk Road with visits to historic sites like the Mausoleum of Khoja Ahmed Yasawi in Turkestan. Kazakhstan’s cultural capital, Almaty, blends modern sophistication with deep-rooted traditions, while the capital city, Nur-Sultan (formerly Astana), showcases architectural marvels reflecting Kazakhstan’s dynamic growth.
(Our expert local guides—partnered through the best tours and travel agency in India—ensure you get authentic insights into Kazakh culture and heritage.)

Ideal for Adventure Seekers, Nature Lovers, and Cultural Explorers
From trekking through canyons and skiing at Shymbulak to exploring bustling markets and sacred monuments, Kazakhstan offers something for every traveler. Whether you are a honeymoon couple, family, or solo adventurer, the country’s diverse offerings will leave you inspired.
(Customer testimonials highlight unforgettable moments at Shymbulak Ski Resort and serene experiences at Big Almaty Lake—great for those seeking unique honeymoon packages.)

Top India to Kazakhstan Tour Packages

7 Days Kazakhstan Tour Package from India – Highlights of Almaty and Nur-Sultan
Experience the best of Kazakhstan with our 7-day itinerary covering Almaty’s natural beauty and Nur-Sultan’s futuristic cityscape. This Kazakhstan tour package from India includes iconic landmarks like Panfilov Park, Bayterek Tower, and the Hazrat Sultan Mosque.
(Sample itinerary and pricing details are available on our website; contact the best travel agency for international travel for personalized plans.)

Kazakhstan Adventure Tour Packages from India
For thrill-seekers, our adventure-focused India to Kazakhstan tour options feature trekking at Charyn Canyon, skiing in Shymbulak, and exploring vast wilderness areas.
(We provide all necessary equipment and certified guides for a safe and exciting experience.)

Budget-Friendly Kazakhstan Tour Packages for Indian Travelers
Discover the country without stretching your budget. Our affordable India to Kazakhstan tour packages combine value with comfort, perfect for Indian travelers seeking quality experiences.
(Early bookings through best international tour operators often benefit from exclusive discounts.)

Customized India to Kazakhstan Tour Packages for Families and Groups
Travel with your loved ones or friends with customized itineraries tailored to your group’s preferences, interests, and pace, ensuring a personalized and memorable journey.
(Flexible payment options and visa assistance are part of our service—just one of the reasons we’re ranked among the best tour and travel company options for international trips.)

Must-Visit Destinations Covered in Kazakhstan Tour Packages

Almaty – The City of Apple Trees
Nestled beneath the Zailiyskiy Alatau Mountains, Almaty is a vibrant mix of nature and city life. Enjoy strolls in Panfilov Park, cable car rides to Kok Tobe, and visits to serene spots like Big Almaty Lake.
(Our packages include guided city tours and leisure time—offered by the best domestic tour operators in India.)

Nur-Sultan (Astana) – Modern Capital Attractions
Explore Nur-Sultan’s futuristic skyline, featuring architectural wonders such as the Bayterek Tower, Khan Shatyr Mall, and the expansive Hazrat Sultan Mosque.

Charyn Canyon – Central Asia’s Grand Canyon
Marvel at the breathtaking geological formations of Charyn Canyon, ideal for trekking, photography, and soaking in natural beauty.

Lake Balkhash – Stunning Natural Beauty
Experience one of Kazakhstan’s largest lakes, famous for its unique half-fresh, half-salty waters and surrounding wildlife.

Medeu Skating Rink and Shymbulak Ski Resort
Visit Medeu, the world’s highest ice skating rink, and Shymbulak Ski Resort, a year-round destination for winter sports and summer hiking.

What’s Included in the Best India to Kazakhstan Tour Packages?

International Flights and Airport Transfers
Our Kazakhstan tour package from Delhi and other Indian cities includes hassle-free flights and airport pickups.
(Travelxploria, a leading travel agency for international travel, handles baggage, customs, and full in-transit support.)

Comfortable Accommodation and Daily Meals
Stay in well-appointed hotels with meals that combine local flavor with global comfort.
(Special dietary needs accommodated upon request—hallmark of the best tour and travel company in India.)

Guided Sightseeing Tours and Adventure Activities
Engaging guided tours to key attractions are included, with activities like hiking, canyoning, and cultural excursions.
(Certified guides provided by international tour operators guarantee immersive experiences.)

Best Time to Visit Kazakhstan from India

Spring and Autumn – Comfortable Weather for Sightseeing
Mild weather makes these seasons ideal for exploring and enjoying festivals.

Winter – For Skiing and Snow Activities
Winter months bring snow sports in Shymbulak and festive vibes in the cities.

Tips for Planning Your Trip According to the Season
Pack accordingly and refer to our travel kit, sent after booking via our best tours and travel agency in India.

Frequently Asked Questions About India to Kazakhstan Tour Packages

Do Indian citizens need a visa for Kazakhstan?
Yes, a visa is required. We assist with all formalities.

What is the ideal duration for Kazakhstan tours?
7–14 days is optimal for covering major and offbeat locations.

Are Kazakhstan honeymoon packages available?
Absolutely! We offer India to Kazakhstan honeymoon tour packages with romantic locations and experiences. Great choice for honeymoon packages from Kolkata too.

Can the package be customized?
Yes. Custom options are available for solo travelers, families, or groups.

Are flights and hotels included?
Yes. Most India to Kazakhstan tour packages with flight and hotel included offer a full-service experience.

How to Book the Best India to Kazakhstan Tour Packages

Trusted Travel Agencies and Online Booking Platforms
Use verified names like Travelxploria, considered the best travel agency for international travel by thousands of satisfied customers.

Tips to Get the Best Deals and Offers
Book early, follow our social channels, and inquire about honeymoon packages or group rates for seasonal deals.

Important Travel Documents and Packing Essentials
Don’t forget your passport, visa, insurance, and seasonal clothes. We provide detailed packing checklists upon booking.

With Travelxploria’s best India to Kazakhstan tour packages, your journey to Central Asia becomes seamless, soulful, and scenic. Book today with one of the best international tour operators and uncover landscapes, culture, and hospitality like never before.
(Get in touch with our expert travel advisors now and begin your unforgettable journey.)

packages.overview:
• Majestic Charyn Canyon – Explore awe-inspiring, rugged landscapes, towering rock formations, and the breathtaking Valley of Castles, resembling the Grand Canyon.

  • Enchanting Kolsai Lake – Marvel at the crystal-clear, serene waters of the "Pearls of Tien Shan," surrounded by lush alpine beauty.

  • Authentic Kazakh Experience at Gunni Ethno Center – Witness vibrant traditions, thrilling horse games, cultural performances, and hands-on workshops in an immersive nomadic village.

  • Exhilarating Medeu & Shymbulak Excursion – Enjoy world-class winter sports, scenic cable car rides, and panoramic views at Kazakhstan’s premier high-altitude ski resort.

  • Luxury Stay at Shymbulak Ski Resort – Relax in cozy, stylish accommodations amidst snow-covered mountains with stunning winter wonderland scenery.

  • Fascinating Almaty City Tour – Discover iconic landmarks, historic squares, lively bazaars, and cultural gems, guided by an expert storyteller.

  • Scenic Kok-Tobe Hill – Ride a cable car, enjoy mesmerizing city views, explore local attractions, and visit the unique Beatles monument.

packages.overview:
Almaty: The largest city in Kazakhstan, nestled at the foothills of the Trans-Ili Alatau Mountains, offering a mix of urban charm and natural beauty.

Shymbulak Ski Resort: A world-class ski destination, located 25 km from Almaty, known for snow-covered slopes, modern ski lifts, and breathtaking mountain views. Ideal for skiing, snowboarding, and winter sports.

Top Attractions: Kok-Tobe Hill, Medeu Ice Rink, Big Almaty Lake, Panfilov Park, and Zenkov Cathedral.

packages.overview: Imagine stepping off the plane into a golden morning framed by the snow-capped peaks of the Trans-Ili Alatau—this is Almaty through Travelxploria’s eyes. Over five sunlit days, you’ll wander the bustling Green Bazaar, where sweet kumys and spice-laden breads mingle with the chatter of friendly vendors. You’ll ride the cable car up to Kok-Tobe, sipping tea as the city unfolds beneath you like a living tapestry, then trek to the emerald waters of Big Almaty Lake, hidden high in the mountains. Evenings bring warm Kazakh hospitality: feasting on savory beshbarmak and swapping stories beneath yurts lit by lantern glow. Come discover the heart of Central Asia with Travelxploria—where every path tells a story, and every sunrise feels like home.

packages.overview: Discover Almaty with Travelxploria on a five-day journey through Kazakhstan’s most enchanting landscapes and vibrant culture. Begin with a guided stroll through the fragrant stalls of the Green Bazaar, sampling fresh kumys and local delicacies as friendly vendors share stories of Silk Road heritage. Then, ascend via cable car to Kok-Tobe’s panoramic outlook—tea in hand, watch the city glow beneath snow-dusted peaks. Midweek, venture into the Trans-Ili Alatau for a gentle hike to the emerald shores of Big Almaty Lake, where Travelxploria arranges a lakeside picnic framed by soaring cliffs. Evenings are reserved for traditional yurt camps: savor steaming bowls of beshbarmak, warm up by lantern light, and drift to sleep under a canopy of stars, knowing every detail has been perfected by Travelxploria.

After breakfast, embark on a full-day Almaty tour with Travelxploria’s expert representative, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Begin at the Park of 28 Panfilov Soldiers, home to the eternal flame, heroic memorials, and the Ascension Cathedral, a remarkable wooden church that survived a strong earthquake. Stroll through the Green Bazaar, a bustling market offering authentic Kazakh delicacies. After lunch, explore the Ili Alatau National Park, visiting Medeo, the world’s highest skating rink, and Shymbulak Mountain Resort. End the day at Kok Tobe, enjoying a scenic cable car ride and breathtaking city views before returning to the hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Ultimate 4WD Adventure: Charyn National Park & Hidden Canyons","day_summary":"

Embark on an exhilarating 4WD Jeep tour with Travelxploria’s expert guide, ensuring a seamless and adventure-packed journey through Charyn National Park. Depart early to explore beyond the Valley of Castles, covering hidden gems like Lunar Canyon, Stone Shelf, Napoleon Rock, and Austrian Viewpoint. Trek down into the Valley of Castles, capturing breathtaking views along the Charyn River. Experience off-road thrills as you navigate rugged landscapes, waterfalls, and dramatic rock formations. With exclusive access to remote sites, immerse yourself in the untamed beauty of Kazakhstan’s canyons before returning to Almaty in the evening.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Journey into Kazakh Traditions","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before heading to the Kazakh Ethno-Village \"Huns\", a unique experience just 35 km from Almaty. Immerse yourself in Kazakhstan’s rich nomadic heritage, from the welcoming ritual \"shashu\" to horseback riding in the scenic mountains. Witness traditional ceremonies, exhilarating horse games, and enjoy a masterclass in making \"baursak\", a beloved Kazakh pastry. Feel the rhythm of Kazakh music and dance, engaging in a vibrant cultural flash mob. After a hearty traditional lunch, you may opt for a horseback riding tour before returning to Almaty in the evening for a relaxing night at your hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

Wake up early for a seamless transfer to Almaty International Airport, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free departure. Our Travelxploria representative will assist you with luggage and check-in, providing a stress-free experience. As you bid farewell to the breathtaking landscapes and rich culture of Kazakhstan, cherish the unforgettable memories made on this journey. We wish you a safe flight home and look forward to welcoming you again for more adventures in this beautiful country.

packages.overview:
Majestic Mountains – Experience Medeu and Shymbulak, offering breathtaking snowy landscapes, thrilling skiing, ice skating, and cozy mountain cafés.

Rejuvenating Nature – Relax at Almarasan Resort, soaking in thermal radon barrels, enjoying snow tubing, sledding, and scenic winter trails.

Scenic Heights – Ascend Kok-Tobe Hill for panoramic Almaty views, serene walks, local cuisine, and enchanting seasonal festivities.

Canyon Wonders – Explore Charyn Canyon’s dramatic snow-covered cliffs and Kolsay Lakes’ serene winter beauty, surrounded by snow-draped pines.

Cultural Immersion – Discover Huns Village, experiencing Kazakh traditions, horse riding, and mesmerizing folk performances in a rich cultural setting.

Local Delights – Wander through Green Bazaar, tasting authentic Kazakh delicacies, shopping for souvenirs, and embracing the city’s vibrant atmosphere.

Thrilling Adventures – Visit Oi Qaragai Resort, ziplining through snowy forests, exploring nature, and dining in a grand Kazakh-style yurt.

packages.overview: Discover Almaty’s winter wonderland with Travelxploria as your guide: begin your adventure gliding across the world’s highest rink at Medeu before carving fresh tracks at the Shymbulak ski resort, all framed by the Trans-Ili Alatau’s snow-capped peaks. Wander through snow-dusted lanes of Panfilov Park to marvel at the colorful Zenkov Cathedral, then warm up with a soak in thermal-radon barrels at the cozy Almarasan Resort—complete with heart-pounding snow tubing and sledding. Feel the rush atop Gorilla Energy Park’s zip lines and rope jumps, and savor panoramic city views from Kok-Tobe’s cable car, where steaming bowls of beshbarmak await. Venture beyond the city to marvel at Charyn Canyon’s frosted cliffs, explore the serene ice-blanketed Kolsay Lakes, and breathe in pine-scented air at Oi Qaragai’s snow-covered forests. Back in town, haggle for spices at the bustling Green Bazaar, experience authentic horseback performances at Huns Village, and restore your spirit in the tranquil gardens of the First President’s Park. With every detail arranged by Travelxploria, this immersive journey blends adrenaline, culture, and relaxation into the perfect Kazakh winter escape.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable winter escape in Almaty with Travelxploria, where every day blends adrenaline, culture and cozy comforts. Begin by conquering the world’s highest ice rink at Medeu and carving fresh powder at Shymbulak—complete with warm stops in charming alpine cafés—then melt away tension at Almarasan Resort’s thermal-radon barrels before racing down snowy slopes on tubes and sleds. Glide skyward to Kok-Tobe for panoramic city vistas, gentle winter strolls and steaming bowls of beshbarmak, then venture beyond the city to witness Charyn Canyon’s frozen cliffs and the tranquil, ice-topped Kolsay Lakes. Back in town, lose yourself in the kaleidoscope of flavors at the Green Bazaar—sampling kurt, baursaks and kumys—and feel your pulse quicken at Oi Qaragai Resort, where zip-lines, forest trails and a grand tent-shaped feast await. Delve into Kazakhstan’s nomadic heritage at Huns Village with horseback performances and traditional games, then round out your journey with a peaceful skate and snow-clad walk through the First President’s Park. With Travelxploria choreographing every transfer, guide and meal, you’re free to savor each crystalline moment of this Kazakh winter wonderland.

packages.overview:
• Kazakhstan: The largest Central Asian country, known for its diverse landscapes, rich history, and modern cities.

  • Almaty: The cultural and financial hub, surrounded by mountains, featuring Kok-Tobe Hill, Shymbulak Ski Resort, Medeu Ice Rink, and Big Almaty Lake.

  • Turkestan: A historical gem, home to the Mausoleum of Khoja Ahmed Yasawi, a UNESCO World Heritage site, and an important spiritual center.

  • Shymkent: A lively city blending Silk Road heritage with modern attractions, including Aksu-Zhabagly Nature Reserve and bustling bazaars.

  • Astana (Nur-Sultan): The futuristic capital, boasting Bayterek Tower, Hazrat Sultan Mosque, Khan Shatyr Mall, and Expo 2017 complex.

packages.overview:
• Historic Almaty City Tour – Explore Panfilov Park, Zenkov Cathedral, Green Bazaar, and Kok Tobe with breathtaking city views.

  • Adventurous Jeep Tour – Traverse Altyn Emel National Park’s stunning landscapes, ancient Aktau Mountains, and a mystical 700-year-old osier tree.

  • Singing Dune Phenomenon – Witness the natural wonder of a dune that hums like an organ, surrounded by mesmerizing desert views.

  • Zharkent & Charyn Canyon – Discover a cultural gem near China’s border before exploring the awe-inspiring “Valley of Castles” rock formations.

  • Enchanting Kolsay Lakes – Trek through the pristine Tien Shan Mountains, sail on emerald waters, or take an optional horseback ride.

  • Mystical Kaindy Lake – Marvel at submerged trees standing eerily in crystal-clear waters, a surreal result of a century-old earthquake.

  • Picturesque Medeo & Shymbulak – Visit the world’s highest skating rink and Kazakhstan’s premier ski resort for panoramic mountain views.

  • Sunkar Falcon Show – Experience a thrilling demonstration of Kazakh eagle hunting traditions with majestic birds of prey.

  • Serene Park of the First President – Stroll through beautifully landscaped gardens offering peace and scenic beauty.

Start your adventure with an early breakfast before embarking on a thrilling jeep tour across the breathtaking Almaty region. Travel 255 km to Altyn Emel National Park, a vast and diverse sanctuary of majestic landscapes and rich wildlife. After a delicious lunch at a guesthouse, explore the mesmerizing Aktau White Mountains, a 400-million-year-old geological wonder known for its surreal mix of blue, white, pink, red, and green hues. Visit the legendary 700-year-old osier tree, steeped in mystery and wisdom. Return to the guesthouse for a hearty dinner and a peaceful overnight stay amidst nature’s splendor.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Singing Dunes, Zharkent & Charyn Canyon Adventure","day_summary":"

Continue your exploration of Altyn Emel National Park with a visit to the mystical Singing Dunes, a natural wonder that produces organ-like melodies when the sand shifts in dry weather. Enjoy the breathtaking panoramic views before heading to Zharkent, a charming town near the Chinese border. Discover its unique blend of cultures by visiting the Dungan Mosque, local church, and bustling market.After a delicious lunch at a local café, journey to Charyn National Park, where the spectacular Valley of Castles awaits. Hike through towering red rock formations down to the Charyn River, immersing yourself in the canyon’s surreal beauty. By evening, arrive at a guesthouse or Mountain Resort near Kolsay Lakes, where you’ll unwind over a hearty dinner.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Kolsay Lakes – The Pearl of Tien Shan","day_summary":"

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at the guesthouse or Mountain Resort, followed by a journey to the breathtaking Kolsay Lakes, known as the \"Necklace of Tien Shan.\" Nestled in the Northern Tien Shan Mountains near the Kyrgyzstan border, these pristine lakes sit at elevations of 1,800m, 2,300m, and 2,900m, surrounded by lush coniferous forests and towering peaks.For adventure seekers, a 3-4 hour trek from the first to the second lake offers a scenic escape (lunch boxes included). Alternatively, opt for a horseback ride or simply relax by the crystal-clear waters, enjoying the serene atmosphere. Boat rentals are also available for a tranquil sail. Dinner and overnight stay at a cozy guesthouse or Mountain Resort.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Kaindy Lake – The Submerged Forest of Kazakhstan","day_summary":"

After breakfast and checkout, embark on a scenic journey to the mystical Kaindy Lake, a natural wonder formed after a powerful earthquake in 1911. This emerald-green lake, nestled within a gorge, submerged an entire coniferous forest, leaving the tree trunks eerily rising above the water—a sight unlike any other. The lake’s frigid waters have preserved these trees for over a century, making it a must-see marvel.

Reaching Kaindy Lake requires a short trek from the hilltop, offering breathtaking panoramic views. Alternatively, opt for a horseback ride provided by locals for an authentic experience.

On the way back, stop by a traditional village house for a delicious homemade lunch, then relax as you make your way back to Almaty for hotel check-in and overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Exploring Almaty’s Mountain Wonders & Falconry Tradition","day_summary":"

After breakfast, embark on an exciting journey to explore Almaty’s breathtaking natural wonders. Begin with the majestic Ili Alatau Mountains, a vast national park stretching 120 km with elevations reaching up to 5,000 meters. Visit Medeo, home to the world’s highest-altitude ice-skating rink at 1,690 meters, before ascending to the renowned Shymbulak Mountain Resort at 2,260 meters, a once rugged ski spot now transformed into a modern alpine retreat. Continue to Sunkar Falcon Farm, where you will witness a mesmerizing falconry show featuring majestic birds of prey, a cherished tradition of Kazakh culture. Conclude the day with a visit to the Park of the First President before returning to the hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

Early morning, our Travelxploria representative will provide a seamless transfer to Almaty International Airport for your departure. Reflect on your unforgettable journey through Kazakhstan’s breathtaking landscapes, rich history, and cultural wonders. With cherished memories and incredible experiences, bid farewell to this enchanting land. Wishing you a safe and pleasant flight.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Almaty","to":"Almaty International Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

Nestled within Charyn National Park, it also houses the renowned Ash Tree Grove. The stunning landscapes make the long journey worthwhile, leaving an everlasting impression. Enjoy a picturesque picnic, take a leisurely walk through the canyon, and soak in the unparalleled beauty before returning to Almaty for an overnight stay.

Return to Astana and continue your journey through the city's modern wonders. Visit the Palace of Peace and Reconciliation, a striking pyramid, and the Nur-Alem complex, a futuristic highlight from EXPO 2017. Enjoy free time before returning to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Vibrant Almaty & Nauryz Festival
Experience the colorful Nauryz Festival, explore historic landmarks, stroll through bustling bazaars, and enjoy a panoramic city view.

Immersive Nomadic Experience
Step into the ancient nomadic world, witness thrilling horse games, enjoy a majestic eagle show, and explore authentic Kazakh yurts.

Spectacular Charyn Canyon Adventure
Marvel at the breathtaking canyons, hike through the Valley of Castles, admire dramatic rock formations, and experience untouched natural beauty.

Majestic Mountain Escapade

After breakfast at the hotel, embark on a scenic one-hour drive to the Kazakh Ethnic Center “Nomad”, where the rich heritage of the ancient steppe comes to life. Experience the thrill of nomadic warfare through mesmerizing displays of horseback archery, swordsmanship, and traditional games like kokpar, jigitovka, and audaryspaq. Witness the awe-inspiring Eagle Hunter Show, where a skilled Berkutchi commands a golden eagle in a breathtaking display of falconry. Step into history by mounting a horse, trying your hand at archery, and even donning traditional nomadic armor for a truly immersive experience. Enjoy an authentic Kazakh lunch, then explore a traditional yurt, learning about the craftsmanship and ingenuity behind these portable homes. After an enriching day, return to Almaty in the afternoon for a leisurely evening and overnight stay at the hotel.

Unlike standard tours, this exclusive journey covers five breathtaking locations, including the Valley of Castles, Lunar Canyon, and Austrian Viewpoint. Trek down to the Charyn River, admire panoramic landscapes, and explore rugged trails with stunning rock formations. Discover hidden gems like Stone Shelf and Napoleon Rock before heading back. Enjoy a lunch box amid nature before returning to Almaty, filled with unforgettable memories of Kazakhstan’s most spectacular canyon. An adventure like no other awaits!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"A Day in Almaty’s Wild Side","day_summary":"

Visit Medeo, the world’s highest skating rink at 1,690 meters, before ascending to Shymbulak Mountain Resort at 2,260 meters, once a favorite among Soviet-era skiers. After lunch, experience the awe-inspiring Sunkar Falcon Farm, where trained eagles, falcons, and owls showcase Kazakhstan’s ancient hunting traditions. Witness these majestic birds in action before heading back to your hotel for a relaxing evening. An unforgettable blend of nature, adventure, and heritage awaits!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Almaty","day_summary":"

packages.overview:
• Almaty City Tour – Explore Almaty's charming old center, vibrant Green Bazaar, historic Panfilov Park, and the stunning Ascension Cathedral.

  • Ili Alatau & Shymbulak – Experience breathtaking mountain views, the world’s highest Medeo skating rink, and Kazakhstan’s best ski resort, Shymbulak.

  • Charyn Canyon Adventure – Marvel at Kazakhstan’s spectacular Grand Canyon-like landscapes, unique rock formations, and thrilling trekking experiences.

  • Kazakh Ethno Village – Immerse in authentic Kazakh culture, exhilarating horse games, vibrant music, and delicious traditional cuisine.

  • Turkestan & Mausoleum Visit – Discover the majestic UNESCO-listed Khodja Ahmet Yassawi Mausoleum and the enchanting Karavansaray complex.

  • Otrar & Arystan-Bab – Walk through the ruins of the ancient Silk Road city and visit the sacred Arystan-Bab Mausoleum.

  • Astana Sightseeing – Admire futuristic architecture, including Baiterek Tower, Nur Alem Museum, and the magnificent Astana Grand Mosque.

  • Palace of Peace & National Museum – Explore Astana’s iconic pyramid and Kazakhstan’s largest museum, showcasing ancient artifacts and national heritage.

Start your day with an early breakfast before embarking on a scenic bus tour (08:00 – 20:00) to Charyn Canyon, one of Kazakhstan’s most breathtaking natural wonders. Located 220 km from Almaty, this spectacular canyon, often called the \"little brother\" of the Grand Canyon, stretches 154 km and is steeped in legends of \"witches,\" \"red wolves,\" and the \"road to hell.\" Enjoy a leisurely trek through the famous \"Valley of Castles\", where towering rock formations create a mesmerizing landscape. After admiring the breathtaking panoramic views and having lunch by the Charyn River, return to Almaty for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Immersing in Kazakh Nomadic Traditions & Journey to Shymkent","day_summary":"


After breakfast and check-out, set off for the Kazakh Ethno Village \"Huns\", a cultural escape 35 km from Almaty in the scenic Talgar district. Experience the nomadic lifestyle with a warm \"shashu\" welcome, explore traditional yurts, witness ancient Kazakh rituals like \"Besikke salu\" and \"Tusau kesu,\" and enjoy thrilling horse games such as \"Kyz Kuu\" and \"Atpen Audaryspak.\" Participate in folk dances, live music, and a hands-on \"baursak\" cooking masterclass.

After a traditional Kazakh lunch, return to Almaty for free time. Later, transfer to the railway station (21:00) for an overnight train journey (22:00) to Turkestan.

Known as Farab, this historic site played a crucial role in Central Asia’s trade and cultural exchanges.En route to Shymkent, stop at the Arystan-Bab Mausoleum, a revered pilgrimage site dedicated to the spiritual mentor of Khodja Akhmet Yassawi. overview:
Best India to Kazakhstan Tour Packages – Discover Central Asia’s Hidden Gem

Welcome to the best India to Kazakhstan tour packages, where Central Asia’s hidden gem awaits your discovery. Kazakhstan offers an extraordinary blend of snow-capped mountains, endless steppes, futuristic cities, and rich cultural heritage. With Travelxploria, your trusted best international travel agents in Kolkata and best tour and travel company in India, explore the wonders of Kazakhstan through carefully curated Kazakhstan tour packages designed for comfort, culture, and unforgettable experiences.
(Note: Travelxploria is recognized by the Kazakhstan Tourism Board for excellence in international travel services and known among the best domestic tour operators in India.)

Why Choose Kazakhstan for Your Next International Trip?

Diverse Landscapes from Steppes to Mountains
Kazakhstan’s vast landscapes range from the golden steppes stretching endlessly to majestic, snow-covered peaks. Whether it’s the turquoise waters of Big Almaty Lake or the dramatic formations of Charyn Canyon, every destination promises stunning views and adventures for all types of travelers.
(Pro tip: The best time to visit these natural wonders is during spring or autumn for comfortable weather and vibrant scenery.)

Rich History and Vibrant Culture
Step back in time along the ancient Silk Road with visits to historic sites like the Mausoleum of Khoja Ahmed Yasawi in Turkestan. Kazakhstan’s cultural capital, Almaty, blends modern sophistication with deep-rooted traditions, while the capital city, Nur-Sultan (formerly Astana), showcases architectural marvels reflecting Kazakhstan’s dynamic growth.
(Our expert local guides—partnered through the best tours and travel agency in India—ensure you get authentic insights into Kazakh culture and heritage.)

Ideal for Adventure Seekers, Nature Lovers, and Cultural Explorers
From trekking through canyons and skiing at Shymbulak to exploring bustling markets and sacred monuments, Kazakhstan offers something for every traveler. Whether you are a honeymoon couple, family, or solo adventurer, the country’s diverse offerings will leave you inspired.
(Customer testimonials highlight unforgettable moments at Shymbulak Ski Resort and serene experiences at Big Almaty Lake—great for those seeking unique honeymoon packages.)

Top India to Kazakhstan Tour Packages

7 Days Kazakhstan Tour Package from India – Highlights of Almaty and Nur-Sultan
Experience the best of Kazakhstan with our 7-day itinerary covering Almaty’s natural beauty and Nur-Sultan’s futuristic cityscape. This Kazakhstan tour package from India includes iconic landmarks like Panfilov Park, Bayterek Tower, and the Hazrat Sultan Mosque.
(Sample itinerary and pricing details are available on our website; contact the best travel agency for international travel for personalized plans.)

Kazakhstan Adventure Tour Packages from India
For thrill-seekers, our adventure-focused India to Kazakhstan tour options feature trekking at Charyn Canyon, skiing in Shymbulak, and exploring vast wilderness areas.
(We provide all necessary equipment and certified guides for a safe and exciting experience.)

Budget-Friendly Kazakhstan Tour Packages for Indian Travelers
Discover the country without stretching your budget. Our affordable India to Kazakhstan tour packages combine value with comfort, perfect for Indian travelers seeking quality experiences.
(Early bookings through best international tour operators often benefit from exclusive discounts.)
